problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Combining Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
